summary: Two-dataset architecture: Live Transactions (hourly, machine-generated, immutable, high confidence) and Backdate Estimates (daily, retroactive, regenerable, lower confidence). Live layer is always source of truth; backdate fills gaps. When mapping changes, backdate is wiped and regenerated while live data stays untouched. Query uses overlay pattern: live > backdate > empty. Includes full data models, worked timeline, merge query logic, and dashboard trust indicators.
